title: Hydra (Imperial I-class)
content:

{{Quote|Together, we lost a total of three TIE squadrons, and of course all hands and resources on board the ''Hydra''.|Kratas|<ref name="Dark Apprentice">[[Dark Apprentice (novel)|''Dark Apprentice'']]</ref>}}
The '''''Hydra''''' was one of four [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyers]] stationed at the [[Maw Installation]] as part of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala]]'s squadron.

==History==
{{Quote|Why did she come back with only one Star Destroyer? She had four. No wait—one was destroyed, wasn't it?|Tol Sivron|<ref name="Champions of the Force">''[[Champions of the Force]]''</ref>}}
The ''Hydra'' was destroyed when [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] - accompanied by [[Qwi Xux]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], and [[Kyp Durron]] - flew the [[Sun Crusher]] through her control bridge during the group's escape from the [[Maw Installation]]. Control of the vessel was lost, and it was pulled into one of the Maw's many black holes, where it was crushed by intense gravitational forces.
